title: Wash My Soul in the River's Flow
original_title: Wash My Soul in the River's Flow
overview: Go behind the scenes, and onto the stage, of a legendary concert to discover the story of Archie Roach and Ruby Hunter, told in song – a story that should be told to every Australian.
